ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model used (e.g., sparse_transformer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter set */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the hyperparameters belong */,
  "hparams" TEXT /* Hyperparameter configuration name */,
  "moses_bleu" REAL /* MOSES BLEU score of the model */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Sparsity level of the model */,
  "begin_pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning begins */,
  "end_pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning ends */,
  "pruning_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of pruning */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Regularization technique used */,
  "threshold_decay" REAL /* Threshold decay rate */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs trained */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the log entry belongs */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Training step number when the log was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Any relevant metric value at the time of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "epoch_number" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the metric was recorded */,
  "validation_split" REAL /* Validation split used for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pruning_details" (
  "pruning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pruning entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the pruning details belong */,
  "pruning_step" INTEGER /* Step at which pruning was performed */,
  "pruned_layers" TEXT /* Layers that were pruned */,
  "pruned_neurons" INTEGER /* Number of neurons pruned */,
  "pruned_weights" INTEGER /* Number of weights pruned */,
  "pruning_method" TEXT /* Method used for pruning */,
  "pruning_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for pruning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pruning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pruning_details_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the experiment was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "base_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base version from which this version was derived */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message describing the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_base_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
